'''tharuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plackard|plackard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plackard|plackard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tharuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thærivith|thærivith]] || [[word:thærivij|thærivij]] || [[word:thærivish|thærivish]] || [[word:thærivi|thærivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tharuruvuth|tharuruvuth]] || [[word:tharuruvuj|tharuruvuj]] || [[word:tharuruvush|tharuruvush]] || [[word:tharuruvu|tharuruvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharuvuth|tharuvuth]] || [[word:tharuvuj|tharuvuj]] || [[word:tharuvush|tharuvush]] || [[word:tharuvu|tharuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharufvuth|tharufvuth]] || [[word:tharufvuj|tharufvuj]] || [[word:tharufvush|tharufvush]] || [[word:tharufvuf|tharufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tharuvuthu|tharuvuthu]] || [[word:tharuvuju|tharuvuju]] || [[word:tharuvushu|tharuvushu]] || [[word:tharuvuku|tharuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tharuvuth|tharuvuth]] || [[word:tharuvuj|tharuvuj]] || [[word:tharuvush|tharuvush]] || [[word:tharuvu|tharuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tharuvuthul|tharuvuthul]] || [[word:tharuvujul|tharuvujul]] || [[word:tharuvushul|tharuvushul]] || [[word:tharuvukul|tharuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tharuvuthuthu|tharuvuthuthu]] || [[word:tharuvujuju|tharuvujuju]] || [[word:tharuvushushu|tharuvushushu]] || [[word:tharuvuku|tharuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tharuvuthun|tharuvuthun]] || [[word:tharuvujun|tharuvujun]] || [[word:tharuvushun|tharuvushun]] || [[word:tharuvukun|tharuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tharuvuthuoro|tharuvuthuoro]] || [[word:tharuvujuoro|tharuvujuoro]] || [[word:tharuvushuoro|tharuvushuoro]] || [[word:tharuvukuoro|tharuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
